data.title: Applied Materials Hikes Dividend For 8th Year, Greenlights $10 Billion Buyback to Reward Investors
data.description: Applied Materials increases dividend by 15% for 8th consecutive year, authorizes $10B share repurchase. Generated $925M in cash in Q1.

data.title: Rocket Wants $1.75 Billion Redfin Deal To Change How America Buys Homes
data.description: Redfin shareholders will receive 0.7926 shares of Rocket Class A common stock for each Redfin share—a 63% premium.
